pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to support the new JDK.
Bump Spring Framework version from 4.2.3 to 5.1.2 to align with Java 11 compatibility requirements.
Migrate from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) to support modern testing standards and Java 11.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to 3.8.0 to ensure proper compilation support for Java 11.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to 2.22.1 to support JUnit 5 test execution.
Upgrade aspectj-maven-plugin to 1.11.1 to support Java 11 bytecode generation.
Bump AspectJ runtime and tools to 1.9.2 for Java 11 compatibility.
Add explicit dependency on javax.jms-api 2.0.1 to replace removed Java EE modules in Java 11.
Bump XStream to 1.4.11.1 to address security vulnerabilities and ensure Java 11 compatibility.
Bump Log4j to 2.11.1 to address security issues and maintain compatibility.
Bump SLF4J to 1.7.25 for consistency with updated logging dependencies.
Bump commons-configuration2 to 2.3 for bug fixes and stability.
Bump commons-lang3 to 3.8.1 for latest features and bug fixes.
Bump joda-time to 2.10.1 for maintenance updates.
Bump jopt-simple to 5.0.4 for maintenance updates.
Bump ActiveMQ to 5.15.7 for stability and security patches.
Bump Mockito to 2.23.0 to support JUnit 5 and Java 11.
Add maven-enforcer-plugin to strictly require Java 11 and Maven 3.2.1+.
Refactor POM from a simple jar project to a parent POM with dependency and plugin management.
Update distribution management URLs to point to Sonatype Nexus and GitHub Pages.
Update SCM connection details to reflect the new repository location (powertac-core).

.gitignore.general_idea: Replace custom, sparse .gitignore rules with a comprehensive, standardized template covering multiple IDEs and build artifacts.
.gitignore.human_impl: Replaced IntelliJ-specific entries with a full list including Eclipse, Maven, OS artifacts, and general build outputs.
